name: screen-guardian
description: Ultra-light compatibility-first AI screen access with fallback adapters.

interface.shortDescription: 不强迫升级的超轻量 AI 屏幕访问。
interface.longDescription: Screen Guardian is freedom-preserving capability infrastructure for personal AI. This ultra-light release keeps limits, storage routes, and model/program routes configurable so users can add paths, adjust workflow bounds, and prepare requests for judgment, OCR, image narration, video narration, or transcription adapters without forcing heavy dependencies.
defaultPrompt: Watch a window briefly for visual changes.
